summary: Phase 2 testing of MF Intelligence. Backend: 25/25 pytest pass (16 prior + 9 new for portfolios CRUD, XIRR ~22% admin, tax-report STCG+LTCG, SIP planner basic + step-up + validation). Lifespan migration verified — admin gets default Main Portfolio with fund_count=4. Frontend: login works, Tools section in sidebar (SIP PLANNER, TAX REPORT) confirmed visible. Deeper UI checks (KPI tiles, portfolio-switcher, SIP/Tax pages) were attempted but the Overview page was still in 'LOADING...' state when selectors were queried, so per-component testid presence could not be definitively confirmed in this run.

issues: button[type=submit] selector matched but full-CSS submit didn't resolve in 30s — works via get_by_role('button', name='Sign In'). Consider adding data-testid='login-submit' for testability.
Page shows 'LOADING...' for several seconds after auth, blocking automated testid queries. Add a stable post-load marker or render skeletons with KPI testids.

action_items: Add data-testid='login-submit' on the Sign In button in LoginPage for stable e2e selectors.
Render Overview page skeletons that include the kpi-{n} data-testid wrappers so tests can detect them while data loads (or wait properly — currently a long Loading… state delays automation).
(Optional) Tax Report disclaimer line (LTCG_EXEMPT 1L) is good; consider showing financial-year context in UI.
critical_code_review_comments: lifespan migration runs on every startup and walks all users — fine at small scale; consider a one-shot migration flag for prod.
_xirr Newton-Raphson has no final convergence guard — returns last rate even if non-converged; could log a warning.
SIP step-up applies AT year-end (after 12th contribution of that year), which matches typical SIP step-up semantics — verified mathematically.
Tax report uses days_held >= 365 as LTCG cutoff — Indian rule is strictly > 12 months; for 365-day edge case, consider using calendar months.

success_rate.frontend: partial — sidebar Tools confirmed; deeper UI not verified due to load timing

seed_data_creation: Tests created and cleaned up TEST_Retirement and TEST_Filter portfolios. Admin's 4-fund seed (backdated 540/720/200/90 days) verified — produced both STCG and LTCG rows and a meaningful XIRR.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run pytest /app/backend/tests/ — 25 tests, ~5s. For frontend automation, the login button is best clicked via get_by_role('button', name='Sign In') (no data-testid yet). After login the Overview shows 'LOADING...' for ~2-3s; wait for data-testid='kpi-0' explicitly with timeout=10000 before querying other testids. Tools sidebar links: nav-sip, nav-tax. Portfolio switcher: portfolio-switcher → portfolio-dropdown → add-portfolio-btn → pf-name-input → pf-create-submit. SIP page testids: sip-monthly, sip-years, sip-expected_return, sip-step_up, sip-calc-btn. Tax page: tax-portfolio-select. Portfolio add modal new field: date-input. All Phase 2 backend endpoints verified working including XIRR (returns xirr_pct ~22% for admin) and tax-report (STCG+LTCG mix).
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Frontend automation timing limitation noted but is not a product bug — adding a data-testid on Sign-In button and skeleton testids on Overview will improve testability.
